chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P.No.S-623 of 2022 Mst. Sidra & another............versus............Province of Sindh & Others --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- DATE: ORDER WITH SIGNATUREs OF THE JUDGE(S) ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ Fresh case 1. For orders on CMA No.4114/2022 (U/A) 2. For orders on office objection No.1 as at “A” 3. For orders on CMA No.4115/2022 (Exp/A) 4. For hearing of main case ------------------------------- 04.07.2022 Mr. Abdul Ghaffar Khan Niazi, advocate along with petitioners ---------------------------------------------- 1. Urgency granted. 2 to 4. The petitioners after having entered into love marriage have mainly sought for protection from the alleged harassment of the private respondents. The Petitioners are having an alternate remedy for the needful before the Ex- Officio Justice of Peace having jurisdiction, which they have not exhausted for no obvious reason, which they have will have to exhaust first prior to approaching this Court. Consequently, the instant petition is dismissed together with the listed application(s). J U D G E
